name: quote-card
title: Quote Card
description: A centered pull-quote scene block with attribution. The quote reveals word-by-word with a slower-than-canonical stagger so the line reads rather than cascades; after a settled beat a small accent-rose rule draws in beneath it, then the author and role fade in together. Built for testimonials, documentary citations, and editorial-feeling section breaks.
pickWhen: a held quotation — pull-quote, customer testimonial, founder line. The word-staggered cascade is the point.
